calendar.matters:
PETITION To Enforce Ira Beneficiary Designation And For 1) Delcaratory Relief; 2) Breach Of Contract
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Off Calendar

Matthew A. Guerras Petition For An Order Approving Release And Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gordon Young, via ZOOM, for Charles Schwab & Co., Objector; Thomasene Knight, via ZOOM, for Matthew Guerra, Petitioner; Michelle Nguyen, via ZOOM, for Debra Kaiseratt, Objector.

Mr. Young recognizes that the court had advised the parties that the matter have been tentatively pre-granted by the court but that he wanted to appear to request that the proposed order include language that a filing of a dismissal with prejudice be filed fifteen days after the settlement has been signed. Ms. Knight has no objection to the preceding so long as the court retains jurisdiction under CCP 664.6. Ms. Nguyen does not oppose the preceding. The court advises the parties that it will add the feature requested by Mr. Young to the proposed order, accordingly.

The Petition for Order Approving Release and Settlement Agreement is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.
